title: The Book of the Dead
lines: The tome is bound in a material that feels uncomfortably like human skin, still warm to the touch. The silver clasps groan as you lift it from the altar.
As you hold the book, the static on your terminal seems to intensify, forming complex geometric patterns that hurt to look at.
A thousand whispered voices speak across the frequency, all begging you to open the pages. You have discovered something that was never meant to be found.
